files_changed.summary: Reusable scene-mountable manager class. Restores placed slots from save state, renders ghost+placed via host-supplied callbacks, persists on every place, awaits async onPlace/onAllPlaced hooks, dispatches completion via observation+stateFlag+quest-tagged dialog (mirrors LabRigBase._emitCompletionDialog).

BRIDGE_MESQUITE_BLUEPRINT — 4-beam horizontal blueprint at y=400. stateKey=bridgeBuiltSlots, completion observation=bridge_built, stateFlag=bridgeBuilt, questId=bridge_collapse, Mr. Chen 'It holds!' dialog text.

First consumer of ConstructionSystem. 3 phases: visit (broken remnants, Mr. Chen nudges back to lab), build (mounts construction, click ghost beams to place, bike load-test tween across bridge after final placement, explicit completeBuild), post-build (renders finished bridge, no construction system). Custom wash channel via Phaser Graphics, monsoon warning sign, locked far-trail indicator. HMR registered.
Imported DryWashScene and added it to ALL_SCENES.
Added DryWashScene registry entry (local layer, arizona_desert region, fromWorldMap spawn at 100,480, exit→WorldMapScene with fromDryWash spawn). Added fromDryWash spawn to WorldMapScene.

Added dry_wash to WORLD_LOCATIONS — entryScene=DryWashScene, mapPos {0.5,0.55} (offset from salt_river to avoid overlap), unlockReq questsAny:['bridge_collapse'] so the location appears once the quest is in the player's log.
bridge_collapse step 15 (build_bridge) gained scene: 'DryWashScene' field. No other changes.

second_consumer_thought_experiment.for_shelter: Shelter would declare a SHELTER_BLUEPRINT with slots like {id:'wall_n',type:'wall',...}, {id:'roof',type:'roof',...} etc, stateKey:'shelterBuiltSlots', completion {observation:'shelter_built', stateFlag:'shelterBuilt', questId:<some shelter quest>, dialog: ...}. The host scene's onPlace would inventory-check appropriate parts (canvas, posts, ties). Its onAllPlaced could run a 'wind test' animation (shake the shelter, gust particles) before resolving — exactly mirroring the bike-load-test flow. Confidence: HIGH that the system holds without changes for any 'click ghosts to place parts → run validation animation → emit completion observation' pattern.
missing_hooks_for_shelter: Per-slot validation (e.g. 'roof can only be placed after all 4 walls') — currently any ghost can be clicked at any time. If shelter has placement order constraints, the host's onPlace can enforce order by checking getPlacedSlotIds() before returning, but a built-in dependency-graph hook would be cleaner.

Pre-mount placement preview / ghost-rotation — current renderer treats slot.x/y/w/h as fixed. Shelter parts may want player-rotatable previews; the system's drawGhost contract is open enough to support this in the host, but no built-in helpers.
Validator strategy registry — deferred per spec. If shelter introduces a third validation type beyond bike-roll and wind-test it would justify lifting onAllPlaced into a registry.

notes: Used autoCompleteAfterAllPlaced=false in DryWashScene so the bike load-test tween runs to completion before completeBuild() emits. The onAllPlaced callback returns a Promise that the system awaits — this is the cleanest way to gate completion on an async animation. saveSystem.js was NOT touched: the existing { ...defaultSave(), ...migrated } merge handles bridgeBuiltSlots:undefined and bridgeBuilt:undefined gracefully, and ConstructionSystem.getPlacedSlotIds() defaults to [] if state.bridgeBuiltSlots is undefined. The salt_river WORLD_LOCATIONS entry uses mapPos {0.5,0.7} so I placed dry_wash at {0.5,0.55} to avoid identical map positions. WorldMapScene already routes via loc.entryScene from worldMapData (no WorldMapScene.js edits needed). Mr. Chen NPC uses the existing Npc entity via addNpc (no new entity types).
